body.title: Ingest TheIgorsProject/akien/Readings early design sessions as Igor INTERPRETIVE memories
body.result: ingest_readings_design_sessions() added to learner.py. Scans ~/TheIgorsProject/akien/Readings/ for .txt/.md files, queues as book_type=design-session, encoding_arousal=0.90, priority=1. Registered as Igor tool. First run: 56 sessions queued. Reading feeder will pick these up on next run.
